description.en: A beautiful blue sea slug that floats upside down on the ocean surface and eats venomous jellyfish.
description.zh: 一种美丽的蓝色海蛞蝓，肚皮朝上漂浮在海面上，以有毒的水母为食。

anatomy.en: They are only 3 cm long. They use countershading: their blue belly faces up to match the water, and their silver back faces down.
anatomy.zh: 它们只有 3 厘米长。它们利用反荫蔽：蓝色的腹部朝上以融入海水，银色的背部朝下。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They float by swallowing air bubbles. They swallow the stinging cells of jellyfish and use them for their own defense.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们通过吞食气泡来漂浮。它们会吞下水母的刺细胞，并将其转用于自身的防御。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Found in temperate and tropical waters of the Atlantic, Pacific, and Indian Oceans.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 分布于大西洋、太平洋和印度洋的温带及热带海域。
